title: InsureTech Landscape

source.file: input_data/corpus/20200803 PC-Strategy-Solution Development and GoToMarket PlanVer1.5.xlsx

grain: one row per insurtech company assessed
summary: An assessment of 81 insurtech companies: what each does, its target market, line of business, vertical, products/business lines supported, funding, digital-disruption level, and industry utility, plus EXL's own 2019 ranking, 2020 rating, and investment-potential judgment. A set of line-of-business flag columns (APD, Worker's Compensation, Healthcare, Life, Pet, Personal, Small/Large Commercial, etc.) mark which LOBs each insurtech touches. Use it to look up or filter/rank insurtechs by market, LOB, category, funding, or EXL rating.
use_cases: What does a given insurtech do, and what market/LOB/vertical and funding does it have?
Which insurtechs did EXL rate highest (2020 EXL Rating) or see most investment potential in?
Which insurtechs operate in a given line of business (e.g., APD, Healthcare, Personal)?
Segment or rank insurtechs by category, vertical, or digital-disruption level.

columns.name: 2020 EXL Rating
columns.note: Low/Medium/High; some rows carry a numeric 0

columns.name: Market.1
columns.note: second column literally named 'Market'; here geography, e.g. US

columns.name: Potential Funding
columns.note: funding amount as free text with units, e.g. $925m / $1.3b

columns.name: Market.2
columns.note: third column literally named 'Market'; segment, e.g. Personal/Small Business

examples.What they do: A health insurer, utilizing a data driven system to allow for more in-depth personalization...[truncated]
examples.Value Chain: Policy Acquisition, Policy Underwriting, Policy Servicing, Claims Management, F&A

examples.What they do: A car insurance company helping low-mileage drivers save money with a pay-per-mile insurance model. Personal auto. Telematics
examples.Value Chain: Policy Acquisition, Policy Underwriting, Policy Servicing, Claims Management

not_answerable.q: What is each insurtech's exact annual revenue?
not_answerable.reason: only 'Potential Funding' is given as free text; no standardized revenue figure

not_answerable.q: How did an insurtech's rating trend beyond 2019 and 2020?
not_answerable.reason: only 2019 ranking and 2020 rating columns exist

not_answerable.q: Is a given insurtech an EXL client and how much revenue does it generate?
not_answerable.reason: no EXL client/revenue columns in this table

warnings: three columns are literally named 'Market' -> pandas renames them 'Market'/'Market.1'/'Market.2' with different meanings (segment / geography / segment)
line-of-business columns (APD, Worker's Compensation, ... Large/Mid Commercial) are sparse 'Yes'/blank flags
title and description banners occupy rows 1-6; header_row is 7
'2020 EXL Rating' mixes Low/Medium/High text with a numeric 0 in some rows
